underlying_goal: Get the full workflow functional by fixing a transcode worker shape validation bug and adding a Forks tab to the task worker dialog
friction_detail: Claude created artifacts using Artifact::create() instead of designated methods, then conditionally hid the Forks tab when user wanted it always visible.
brief_summary: User needed a transcode shape validation bug fixed and a Forks tab added to the worker dialog; both were completed after corrections to Claude's initial approaches.
